home.name: How to Get Started with Starter
home.description: Learn how to use the Starter app to manage your history entries and explore the Sudobility architecture pattern.

steps.name: Sign In or Create an Account
steps.text: Use your email or Google account to sign in and access your personal dashboard.

steps.name: Browse the Documentation
steps.text: Explore the docs page to understand the project architecture and available packages.

steps.name: Create Your First History Entry
steps.text: Navigate to the Histories page and add your first entry with a date and value.

steps.name: Track Your Progress
steps.text: View your contribution stats including your total, the global total, and your percentage share.

webApp.description: Starter is a template project demonstrating the Sudobility architecture pattern with shared types, a Hono API, TanStack Query hooks, and Zustand stores.
features: Shared type definitions across frontend and backend
